documentation.description: Because of this derivation, the code may not adhere to the PragmAda Coding Standard

array_types.name: Byte_List
array_types.code: type Byte_List is array (Positive range <>) of Byte_Value;

subprograms.name: Final
subprograms.code: function Final (CRC : in CRC_Info) return Interfaces.Unsigned_32

documentation.description: Final CRC value after all updates
Resets CRC to its default initial value

subprograms.name: Update
subprograms.code: procedure Update (CRC : in out CRC_Info; List : in Byte_List)

documentation.description: CRC update for a sequence of bytes

subprograms.name: Update
subprograms.code: procedure Update (CRC : in out CRC_Info; Input : in Byte_Value)

documentation.description: CRC update for a single byte
